artifact: marketing/blog/ru-anki-alternativa-yaponskiy.md (1 draft remaining; 5 of 6 drafts migrated to production on 2026-07-21)

brand_voice_check.fsrs_framing: correct (both this draft and existing anki-alternative-japanese use FSRS)

factcheck_round_2.method: External research specialist verification (user-provided), then in-article fixes applied by @marketer
fixes_applied: Manga article: removed non-existent 'Mieru' and 'Kaname' mentions; replaced with verified open-source stack (manga-ocr model, Poricom, YomiNinja) and mobile (KanjiSnap) [applied before migration]
OCR article: replaced 'Imiwa, Akebi, Shirabe Jisho, Japanese by Renzo Inc.' headline — now Imiwa, Nihongo, KanjiSnap; framing reflects Akebi/Shirabe as lookup-only [applied before migration]
OCR article: removed unverifiable accuracy percentages [applied before migration]
AI tutor article: pricing updated to verified values [applied before migration]
AI tutor article: softened '$30-60/hour human tutor' to 'tens of US dollars per hour' [applied before migration]

articles_status.gate_reason: Draft ready factually but deferred from migration to production due to SEO cannibalization with existing anki-alternative-japanese (RU translation already ships; 2 of 5 target_keywords overlap, near-identical section structure). User decision required: delete / repurpose to setup angle / consolidate via 308 redirect. Tracked in uwuwu/origa-blog-anki-cannibalization-decision.
verified_claims: Anki FSRS 23.10/24.10 — verified (docs.ankiweb.net, inline citation present)
All competitor citations (wanikani.com, bunpro.jp, duolingo.com, migii) — inline

translation_status.note: 1 draft remains EN/RU only. The 5 migrated drafts are now tracked in origa_landing/content/blog/.factcheck.json. The remaining draft will be handled per the cannibalization decision before any KO/VI translation.
translation_status.translation_workflow: Awaiting user decision on uwuwu/origa-blog-anki-cannibalization-decision before further action on the remaining draft.

gate_summary: 5 of 6 drafts migrated to production on 2026-07-21 (PR feature/blog-migrate-5-drafts). The 6th draft (ru-anki-alternativa-yaponskiy) is BLOCKED on a user decision regarding SEO cannibalization with anki-alternative-japanese.
